summary: BioHorizons Tapered Short Bug Fix Testing (iteration 16). Backend: 9/9 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend code review confirms fix is correctly implemented. UI automation had limitations due to React Native Web's readonly inputs and modal interactions, but code inspection verifies the fix.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend fix confirmed: ChooseResult component (line 510-512) correctly uses 'all_options' fallback when 'recommended' is empty
Orange info note 'No exact matches for given measurements. Showing all available sizes in this system.' is properly displayed (line 569-572)
Available Sizes header correctly shown instead of Top N Implants when using fallback (line 576-578)
Backend API correctly returns both 'recommended' and 'all_options' arrays
Drilling protocol generation works for all 4 Tapered Short sizes (4.6x6, 4.6x7.5, 5.8x6, 5.8x7.5)
All bone densities (D1-D4) generate correct protocols, with D4 using Reduced Protocol

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - React Native Web UI testing had limitations

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tapered Short bug fix verified via backend tests and code review. The fix makes UI fall back to 'all_options' when 'recommended' is empty. Playwright UI testing had issues with React Native Web's readonly input fields and modal interactions - recommend manual testing or mobile emulator for full E2E verification.

bug_fix_tapered_short_fallback.description: When BioHorizons Tapered Short is selected, recommendation algorithm returns empty because Short implants only have 6mm and 7.5mm lengths (algorithm recommends 10-12mm). UI now falls back to showing all_options.

drilling_protocol_tapered_short.description: Drilling protocol generation works for all Tapered Short implant sizes

tapered_pro_comparison.description: BioHorizons Tapered Pro continues to work normally with recommended matches

pdf_export.description: PDF export works for Tapered Short protocols

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: BioHorizons Tapered Short implants only have lengths of 6mm and 7.5mm, but the recommendation algorithm recommends 10-12mm lengths based on bone height. This resulted in 0 recommended matches.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Frontend ChooseResult component now checks if recommended array is empty and if so, displays all_options (all available sizes in the system) with an orange info note explaining the situation.
reproduction_steps: Navigate to Implant tab > Let Me Choose
Select BioHorizons - Tapered Short from dropdown
Previously: No implants shown. Now: All 4 available sizes shown with info note
